citations.narrative:
In one enclosure there are exposed nails at the bottom of the far paneled wall that are protruding into the outside run. This
could be a hazard as dogs are digging at the gravel of the area where the nails are. These sharp points must be
addressed to keep the enclosure in good repair and for the safety of the dogs.
Correct by: March 15, 2026
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with the licensee.
n

narrative:
3.6(a)(2)(i) 
   
Primary enclosures. 
In one enclosure there are exposed nails at the bottom of the far paneled wall that are protruding into the outside run. This 
could be a hazard as dogs are digging at the gravel of the area where the nails are. These sharp points must be 
addressed to keep the enclosure in good repair and for the safety of the dogs.  
Correct by: March 15, 2026 
 
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with the licensee.
